name: accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed cash flow causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice reminders instead of manual follow-ups and reminders.
problem_solved: Delayed cash flow due to unpaid invoices.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Delayed cash flow due to unpaid invoices.
